$comment: Phase 8 (TODO-09) Pre-Implementation Alignment IR.5 final verdict. Each Sprint-1 dev_agent self-reviewed its three Phase 7 CoT prompts (implementation_execution_plan.json) + its isolated context window (ar3_context_windows.json) against its acceptance criteria (SRS.md), the GRAND BLUEPRINT (hld.md/hld_v3.md), the grand advisory watchlist (grand_advisory_items.json), the DAG ordering (ar2_dag_proof.json), and the Maker-Checker assignment (ar1_assignments.json). BA + PM + SA + scrum-master-agent stood by to resolve flags. RESULT: all 11 stories self-reported CLEAR -> FAST PATH; 0 flags, 0 prompt repairs, 0 context repairs, 0 resolution rounds used. hallucination-detector + context-faithfulness-engineer + reliability-auditor verified the inherited prompts/windows; consensus-agent declared IMPLEMENTATION READY. Source: ir2_resolution_log.json, implementation_execution_plan_v2.json, ar3_context_windows_v2.json, ar1_assignments.json, ar2_dag_proof.json, sprint_1_backlog.md, grand_advisory_items.json, hld.md, SRS.md, _common_context.md.

hallucination_detector.note: Every Phase 8 IR.2 self-review claim entails from the source prompt/window/contract it cites; no fabricated FR/AC/ADR/operationId/advisory references. v2 prompts are verbatim inheritance of Phase 7 prompts -> no new generated content to hallucinate.

context_faithfulness_engineer.note: Each v2 context window is faithful to and bounded by its Phase 7 source window; no context added or dropped; token ceilings unchanged; DPDP PII isolation (field-name/metadata only, no PII VALUES, no cross-tenant/cross-story bleed) re-verified intact in all 11 windows.

reliability_auditor.note: Maker-Checker (review_agent != dev_agent) intact on all 11 stories; DAG wave ordering consistent with every dev-prompt's stated upstream dependency; P1 security checkers (auth-security-specialist/038, threat-modeling-specialist/014, security-compliance-mapper/034) and the security-gate checker (secrets-detection-specialist/005) all canonical Phase-F roster agents; no single point of unreviewed change.

consensus_agent.note: All gate conditions met (0 unresolved flags, NLI=1.0, FactScore=1.0, RS=1.0, DPDP isolation OK, Maker-Checker preserved). No itemized rejection list. Phase B (TODO-10/11/12) is cleared to load implementation_execution_plan_v2.json + ar3_context_windows_v2.json.

phase_b_load_contract.note: v2 = v1 (no repairs; fast path). Phase B agents load the v2 artifacts at Step 5; they are byte-faithful supersets of the Phase 7 originals annotated with phase8_self_review_verdict=CLEAR and v2_provenance. No Phase 7 prompt or window content was altered.

next_action: STOP 8 user review. On user GO, proceed to Phase B (TODO-10/11/12) loading the v2 artifacts.
